title: Renaissance OOTD Grid
description: A reference-dependent series where one Renaissance portrait character keeps the same oil-painted head, expression, and social-grid structure across modern outfit edits.
creative_direction: Identity-lock fashion fanout: image 01 establishes the painted sitter and nine-panel OOTD layout, while images 02-04 reinterpret the clothing language without changing the face, pose logic, or grid hierarchy.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Renaissance OOTD Grid
en.description: A reference-dependent series where one Renaissance portrait character keeps the same oil-painted head, expression, and social-grid structure across modern outfit edits.

zh-CN.title: 文艺复兴 OOTD 九宫格
zh-CN.description: 同一名画人物在多套现代穿搭中保持油画头部、表情和九宫格版式的一致。
